generated_oml:
instance VehicleSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle system"
    base:contains VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderESC, SteeringServo, JetsonNX, JetsonOrinNano
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for environmental perception and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for environmental perception and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data (speed, steering angle, etc.)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
]

instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering using DBSCAN and Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model per ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object tracking processing enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control system enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSavingService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DataSavingService, ReportGenerationService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for development on NVIDIA Jetson platforms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DataSavingService, ReportGenerationService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for scripting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DataSavingService, ReportGenerationService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DataSavingService, ReportGenerationService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle steering control"
]

    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX for computation"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for computation"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling data collection and actuation"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity handling data processing and visualization"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for user interaction"
]

    base:desc "CrossSystem Entity for cross-system communication"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring (viewing)"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDisplayInsight
]

instance DataSavingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSavedInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generating reports for developer troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeveloperTroubleshootingReportInsight
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffloadingInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC system (enable/disable, set desired speed, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state data, object tracks, and projected driving path to support driver trust in ADAS decisions"
]

instance DataSavedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance DeveloperTroubleshootingReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports generated for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC system computation offloaded for efficient processing"
]

]

    base:desc "Disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and vehicle state"
]

    base:desc "ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) sent from DT to vehicle's motor and steering actuators for actuation via ROS2."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency of at most 100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Distributed system with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Cross-System Entity, communicating via ROS2 within entities and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase for system development and validation, and operation phase for monitoring and optimization; represents the as-operated state of the physical vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Implementation of ISO 15622 performance class I ACC without road curvature capabilities; tight coupling between virtual and physical environments for experimentation, but specific verification and validation mechanisms not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with data serialized and translated by Data Translation FE; latency requirement of ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's NVIDIA Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed on separate hardware, with cloud-based computation offloading as indicated in the abstract."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requirements met via 100 ms latency and clock sync; specific cybersecurity protocols not detailed."
]
